1.content: Which martial artist do you get lucky enough to have their feet?
1.title: Who feet/kicks do you bear

choices: Im going to dance on you
11.content:
The first day of high school just ended and you managed to lay low and avoid any potential conflict. You were on the smaller side and thought why take any chances. There's a martial arts school not too far from your house so you decided taking some classes couldn't hurt.

You enter to a women at the front desk. She was on the taller side with beautiful hazel eyes and a great smile.

"Hey, I haven't seen you before so you must new! Just so you know, theres an audition process so we can gauge how skilled you are"

You say sure and gear up. After a few minutes, Caitlin comes out in a black gi asking, "Hey kid, you ready"

Your face shows clear confusion and you thought a man would be teaching you. You ask where the real sensei is and she says that she is the real sensei.

"Don't tell me you don't believe me? Well... seeing as you don't, I have an idea to prove it"

You're thinking this will be no sweat and you taunt her saying she'll be no match since shes a girl. You approach her quickly and throw a punch which she gracefully dodges.

"Come on kid, you're just plain sloppy... wanna forfeit and put on your white belt" she said mockingly.

This pissed you off so you throw a flurry of punches her direction... yet nothing lands and you're exhausting yourself. As you throw the last punch your body could muster, Caitlin catches your hand and fires a side kick.

"KIYAH" she excited shouts as more kicks are thrown your way. From front kicks that push off your face to hook kicks that slap you around, she had full control of the fight.

You get kicked into a wall and you can barely hold yourself. In your blurred vision, you see her come towards you. You scream MERCY and hold your hands up in a frightened pose.

Caitlin does a little dance saying, "HA HA you got beat by a girl" but your bruised ego didn't care, you just didn't want to be hurt further.

The room goes quiet and you open your eyes to see what happened. Caitlin had chambered a sidekick and it looked as though it was gonna break your face. She extended her foot out but she stopped it right in front of your face.

You were so grateful she didn't smash your face so you kiss the blade of her foot, thanking her for not hurting you more.
11.title: Caitlin Dechelle

15531.content: How do you come across her?
15531.title: Sure

15532.content:
How about Cameron Diaz

or

Charlize Theron
15532.title: NO

155321.content:
You both were on the set of Charlie's Angels and you were a huge fan of Cameron Diaz. She was tall, beautiful, and became a badass with all her training for the film. You saw her progress quickly able to do the splits and throw high kicks like it was ordinary.

You weren't much but a PA for whoever needed something done for them. You floated around looking for work. You had helped Cam's co-stars Lucy and Drew extensively by fetching them drinks or their shoes when their training ended.

You guess word spread to Cam because she came up and introduced herself. You obviously knew who she was and stumbled on your wording here and there. She gave a playful grin and told you some things to do for her.

You assisted for the next few days and she was impressed by how well you worked. Her tasked varied from her laundry to massaging her calves after a hard workout.

One morning, Cam grabs you and drags you into her dressing room. She's wearing a suit jacket and trousers but shes barefoot.

You begin to ask whats up but she places the palm of her hand on your face. You take the cue to shut up.

"Okay... important question. The director wants me to demonstrate my best moves to be put up for promotional ads. Let me demonstrate on you some and you tell me which would look the best"

Her palm still on your face, she moves you so your back is too the wall.

Next she chambers a kick and screams HIYAH as her front kick smashes your face.

You wince in pain as obviously it hurt.

"Hey don't be such a baby... by the way how did it look? My foot covered your entire face" she said with a laugh

Before you could reply she fires a side kick right into your lips

"OO that one is definitely being used in the shoot"
155321.title: Cam

info.brief_description: Any female martial artist can dominate you with their feet
info.description:
-Any women who practices martial arts can have a chapter
-Focus on feet/kicking but it can stray
-Use second person
-Add quotes to make it more enjoyable
-Please Add
-Stay Safe everyone :)
